item.title: 🚨 COMMANDER OF IRAN'S AEROSPACE FORCE: FROM NOW ON, MISSILES WITH WARHEADS LIGHTER THAN ONE TON WILL NOT BE LAUNCHED - STATE MEDIA
item.description: 🚨 COMMANDER OF IRAN'S AEROSPACE FORCE: FROM NOW ON, MISSILES WITH WARHEADS LIGHTER THAN ONE TON WILL NOT BE LAUNCHED - STATE MEDIA

item.title:
TRUMP SIGNALS SUPPORT FOR TARGETING IRAN’S NEW SUPREME LEADER
President Donald Trump has told aides he would support the killing of Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, if he refuses U.S. demands such as ending Iran’s nuclear program, according to current and former U.S. officials.
The White House declined to comment, but Trump said he was “not happy” with Khamenei’s selection and previously called him “unacceptable.” “I’m not going through this to end up with another Khamenei,” Trump told Time.
Officials say Israel would likely carry out any operation targeting the Iranian leader, as it has taken the lead in strikes against Iranian leadership figures.
In Washington, Mojtaba Khamenei is widely seen as a hardline successor backed by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and unlikely to abandon Iran’s nuclear ambitions or accept U.S. terms.
item.description:
TRUMP SIGNALS SUPPORT FOR TARGETING IRAN’S NEW SUPREME LEADER

President Donald Trump has told aides he would support the killing of Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, if he refuses U.S. demands such as ending Iran’s nuclear program, according to current and former U.S. officials.

The White House declined to comment, but Trump said he was “not happy” with Khamenei’s selection and previously called him “unacceptable.” “I’m not going through this to end up with another Khamenei,” Trump told Time.

Officials say Israel would likely carry out any operation targeting the Iranian leader, as it has taken the lead in strikes against Iranian leadership figures.

In Washington, Mojtaba Khamenei is widely seen as a hardline successor backed by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and unlikely to abandon Iran’s nuclear ambitions or accept U.S. terms.
